latest_release.name: P(Doom) v0.13.0 -- First Contact league (L2)
latest_release.body: New league epoch L2 (seed weekly-2026-w30). Story cold-open, hiring pipeline, non-profit/for-profit choice, costs-on-buttons, day-precise ledger, candidate portraits, and a chain of soft-lock fixes. Extract the whole zip first, then run PDoom.exe. Unsigned alpha -- SmartScreen: More info -> Run anyway.
